---
title: "Registration"
---

::: {style="font-size: 3rem; text-align: center;"}
:::
Welcome to the Research Software Africa 2026. 

### Call for Volunteers
[Register here](https://forms.gle/7BndopbpXNEudn5AA) to serve as a volunteer during the conference.

### Register for the Conference
Conference registration will open soon. In the meantime, [register here](https://forms.gle/6YdKBMNX19vniVmk8) to receive updates by email.
